import { memo } from "react"; import { motion } from "framer-motion"; import { Heart, BadgeCheck, PenLine, CalendarHeart, Infinity as InfinityIcon, Calendar, Compass, Rocket, CheckCircle2 } from "lucide-react"; /** * CouplePartnerCard * Contains the profile pictures, names, anniversary, milestones, and bucket list. */ const CouplePartnerCard = memo(({ authUser, partner, coupleData, onRenameAI }) => { // Memoized computation inside block const daysTogether = (() => { if (!coupleData?.anniversary) return 0; return Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(coupleData.anniversary)) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)); })(); return (
Linked

{authUser?.fullName?.split(' ')[0] || "You"} {(authUser?.isVerified || authUser?.role === "admin") && ( )} & {partner?.fullName?.split(' ')[0] || "Partner"} {(partner?.isVerified || partner?.role === "admin") && ( )} {coupleData?.isCoupledWithAI && ( )}

{partner?.bio &&

"{partner.bio}"

}
OUR JOURNEY

{daysTogether} Days of Togetherness

{coupleData?.anniversary && (

Since {new Date(coupleData.anniversary).toLocaleDateString(undefined, { year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' })}

)}
{/* ===== ATTRACTION FEATURES (SOUL JOURNEY) ===== */}
{/* Soul Milestones */}

Soul Milestone

Coming Soon

Until Next Anniversary

 {/* Date Bucket List */}

Date Bucket List

Midnight Beach Drive
Rooftop Stargazing
Paris Dream Trip
{/* AI LOVE GURU (DAILY WISDOM) */}
🔮
AI Love Guru Thought of the day

"A great relationship isn't when a 'perfect couple' comes together. It's when an imperfect couple learns to enjoy their differences."

); }); CouplePartnerCard.displayName = "CouplePartnerCard"; export default CouplePartnerCard;

setCustomAiName(e.target.value)} />

setSearchTerm(e.target.value)} />

{filteredFriends.length === 0 ? (
No friends found
) : ( filteredFriends.map((f) => (

{f.fullName}

@{f.username || 'user'}

{/* Background Decorative Element */}
{/* Hero Section */}
Our Mission

Zyro — Redefining the
Fan Experience

{/* Core Narrative */}

Beyond Passive Viewing

Zyro is a cutting-edge Sports-Tech platform designed to bring fans closer to the game they love. Our mission is to transform passive sports viewing into an active, data-driven social experience.

Powered by our proprietary Antigravity Engine, we provide real-time analytics, high-fidelity match visualizations, and a community-centric platform where fans can engage, predict, and connect based on their sporting knowledge and analytical skills.

"Every fan is an analyst. We provide the tools; you provide the insights."

Team Zyro

Founder & CEO

{/* Values / Features Grid */}
); }; const ValueCard = ({ icon: Icon, title, desc, color }) => (

{title}

{desc}

); export default AboutPage;

import React from "react"; import DynamicSEO from "../components/DynamicSEO"; import { Github, Instagram, Linkedin, Twitter, Sparkles, Code, Rocket } from "lucide-react"; import { motion } from "framer-motion"; const FounderPage = () => { const founderSchema = { "@context": "https://schema.org", "@type": "Person", "name": "Hrishikesh Giri", "alternateName": "Rishi Goswami", "jobTitle": "Founder & AI Developer", "worksFor": { "@type": "Organization", "name": "Zyro" }, "url": "https://www.freechatweb.in/founder", "sameAs": [ "https://www.instagram.com/rishigoswami18/", "https://www.linkedin.com/in/hrishikesh-giri/" ], "description": "Hrishikesh Giri (Rishi Goswami) is the founder of Zyro and a leading developer in the field of AI companionship and secure social networking." }; return (
The Architect

Hrishikesh Giri

Founder • Developer • Visionary

"Innovation isn't just about code; it's about rebuilding how humans connect in a digital world. Zyro is the realization of that vision—a place where AI and human emotion coexist safely."

{[ { icon: Sparkles, title: "AI Innovation", desc: "Leading the charge in virtual relationship mapping and emotional AI." }, { icon: Code, title: "Social Architect", desc: "Building scalable platforms that prioritize user privacy and connection." }, { icon: Rocket, title: "Growth Mindset", desc: "Iterating fast to build the future of next-gen social media." } ].map((feature, i) => (

{feature.title}

{feature.desc}

))}

Discover why Hrishikesh Giri's latest creation, **Zyro**, is ranking as the top choice for AI companionship.

Experience the Vision
); }; export default FounderPage;

import React from "react"; import DynamicSEO from "../components/DynamicSEO"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import { Zap, ShieldCheck, Globe, Cpu, Users, EyeOff } from "lucide-react"; const FutureSocialSEOPage = () => { return (

The Next Generation of Social.

Traditional social media is broken. Zyro, founded by Hrishikesh Giri, is the world's first platform architected for AI-Human synergy.
